subcodes.first_line: The doubters and the deluded have not been, nor shall they ever be, vouchsafed a share from the chalice of certitude of the Lord of all worlds. How blessed, therefore [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مریبین و متوهمین را از کاس یقین رب العالمین نصیبی نبوده و نخواهد بود پس خوشا
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
